title: [ORIGINS] Effloresced
description: Effloresced is an Origin that's infected by flowers.
body:
Effloresced is a flower-themed Origin. You can acquire it by meeting a flowery fate as Human.

<details>
<summary>Obtainment</summary>

- Be Human
- Have Weakness
- Be within 2 blocks of a flower
- Hold a flower in either your mainhand or offhand
- Die...?

</details>

<details>
<summary>Effloresced</summary>

Lost where the flowers have grown, a human walked towards a blooming path. The poor human.

* Blossoming, a Goodbye to the Living [ACTIVE]
  * Using the roots of other flowers seemed like clockwork. As natural as using a bow to hunt wildlife.
  * Costs hunger.
  * (All living entities within 10 blocks are significantly slower for a time.)
  * (Targets must be within 3 blocks of a dirt-like block.)

* Synthesis
  * To live was to grow and bloom. To grow was to kill.
  * (Food is only gained via killing living entities. Reduced saturation can be gained from eating.)
  * (Exhaust significantly slower.)

* Sleeping in the Soil
  * Where do they go when they die? The flowers wont let them rest so easily.
  * Costs hunger.
  * (When dying near a dirt-like block, come back to life.)

* Faithful, Hollow Wish
  * Sure enough, they had forgotten their own nature and simply carried that which had forsaken them.
  * (Each flower type has a bonus while held in the inventory.)
  * (Fill your inventory with different flowers for maximum boosts.)

* An Overdone Pleasure
  * What entered them was absorbed to its fullest. What they might've been taking into their own body had been a mere afterthought.
  * (Effect durations doubled.)

* Bundle of Joy
  * All that remained was the flowers blooming from the departed living.
  * (Killing or dying bone meals nearby applicable blocks.)

* Delicate
  * Nothing could be done but mourn for their tragic nature. This path was never meant for humans.
  * (-10 maximum health. 5 hearts of maximum health.)

* The Forgotten Self
  * Not only did they find archery difficult to precisely use, but their behavior simply didn't necessitate projectiles.
  * (-50% projectile damage dealt.)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Flower Modifiers</summary>

### Stats
+7% movement speed - dandelion, oxeye daisy, sunflower

-7% dmg taken - blue orchid, cornflower, pitcher plant

+7% dmg dealt - poppy, red tulip, rose bush

+10% mining speed - pink tulip, pink petals, peony

+15% jump height - lily of the valley, white tulip, azure bluet

### Critical Hits
+7% crit dmg - allium

Crits inflict fire - torchflower

Crits inflict Wither - wither rose

### Misc
Minor Night Vision - orange tulip

Heal on kill - spore blossom

-20% fall speed - lilac

</details>
